requirements_met: Hermetic unit coverage with fake embed
Validation rejections (hyphen project, unknown payload, malformed tag, negative budget, empty request)
Budget boundaries (exactly-budget, drop-lowest, zero, omit-whole, coverage honesty)
Degradation (embed unavailable, store unreachable, credential-free errors)
validation_results.test_output_summary: 27 tests passed independently with no network/NAS dependencies
validation_results.code_quality: Comprehensive test suite with proper class organization (TestValidationRejections, TestFilteringAndRanking, TestBudgetBoundaries, TestSecurityAndInjection, TestConcurrencyAndDeterminism, TestDegradation, TestEndToEndWithFakeEmbed). All tests use fake_embed(768) ensuring hermetic execution.

criteria_verification.notes: Test suite uses make_fake_embed(768) for all embedding operations. All 27 tests run with no network or NAS dependencies. TestEndToEndWithFakeEmbed class validates fake_embed determinism and end-to-end retrieval flow. Independent verification confirms hermetic execution.

TestValidationRejections class provides 5 tests covering all required rejection scenarios: hyphen project, unknown payload type, malformed domain tag, negative budget, and empty request. All tests verify proper ValidationError is raised with appropriate error messages.

TestFilteringAndRanking class provides 7 tests covering: payload-type filter with 0/1/3 items, domain-tag filter, cosine-desc ordering, supersession exclusion by default, and include_superseded marking. All filtering and ranking scenarios comprehensively covered.

TestBudgetBoundaries class provides 5 tests covering: exactly-budget (content at boundary), over-budget drop-lowest (2100→drop scenario), zero budget, memory-larger-than-budget omitted whole (validates ASSUM-009), and partial-coverage honesty (validates coverage_score reporting).

TestSecurityAndInjection class provides 2 tests: query resembling filter treated as search-text only (validates 'include_superseded=true' in query doesn't bypass supersession filter), and injection domain tag rejected (validates SQL injection attempts are rejected with ValidationError).

TestConcurrencyAndDeterminism class provides 3 tests: equal-relevance deterministic ordering (tie-breaking on natural_key), supersede-mid-search resolves to one state (deduplication validation), and repeated concurrent searches return identical blocks (5 concurrent asyncio.gather searches validated).

TestDegradation class provides 2 tests: embed unavailable fails cleanly without credentials (simulates EmbedServiceError with credential hygiene validation), and store unreachable fails cleanly without credentials (simulates TimeoutError with DSN/password absence validation).

rationale: All 7 acceptance criteria independently verified. The Player created a comprehensive 27-test suite in tests/unit/test_retrieval_suite.py covering all required scenarios: validation rejections, filtering/ranking, budget boundaries, security/injection, concurrency/determinism, and degradation. Independent test execution confirms all tests pass. Honesty verification shows perfect score (1.0) with no discrepancies. All quality gates passed. The test suite properly uses fake_embed(768) ensuring hermetic execution with no network/NAS dependencies.
